summary: The test suite provides solid unit test coverage of core logic (parse_manifest, check_compliance, generate_report) with good error handling tests, plus integration testing via act. Strengths: well-organized tests with clear fixtures, proper mocking, independent test cases, workflow structure validation, and end-to-end integration tests. Weaknesses: act tests use shallow substring matching rather than validating output structure rigorously; missing edge cases in manifest parsing (complex version ranges, special characters, environment markers); missing error scenarios in workflow execution (malformed config, missing files); doesn't fully comply with stated requirement that "every test case must execute through act" (unit tests run directly); brittle assertions on GitHub Actions output format. Would catch most regressions in core logic but might miss subtle output format changes or workflow-level issues.
